 [2m251[0m |     const next = !notifStates[id];
 [2m252[0m |     setNotifStates((prev) => ({ ...prev, [id]: next }));
 [2m253[0m | 
 [2m254[0m |     if (id === 'push') {
 [2m255[0m |       if (next) {
 [2m256[0m |         const sub = await subscribeToPush();
 [2m257[0m |         if (sub && sub.endpoint) {
 [2m258[0m |           await fetch('/api/push/subscribe', {
 [2m259[0m |             method: 'POST',
 [2m260[0m |             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
 [2m261[0m |             body: JSON.stringify({ subscription: sub }),
 [2m262[0m |           });
 [2m263[0m |           toast.success('Push notifications enabled');
 [2m264[0m |         } else {
 [2m265[0m |           setNotifStates((prev) => ({ ...prev, push: false }));
 [2m266[0m |           toast.warning('Push permission denied');
 [2m267[0m |         }
 [2m268[0m |       } else {
 [2m269[0m |         const registration = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
 [2m270[0m |         const existing = await registration.pushManager.getSubscription();
 [2m271[0m |         if (existing?.endpoint) {
 [2m272[0m |           await fetch(`/api/push/subscribe?endpoint=${encodeURIComponent(existing.endpoint)}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
 [2m273[0m |         }
 [2m274[0m |         await unsubscribeFromPush();
 [2m275[0m |         toast.info('Push notifications disabled');
 [2m276[0m |       }
 [2m277[0m |       return;
 [2m278[0m |     }

 [2m281[0m |       setAlarmEnabled(next);
 [2m282[0m |       if (next) playAlarm();
